title: Alms.
content:
Give, if thou canst, an alms; if not, afford,
    Instead of that, a sweet and gentle word:
    God crowns our goodness wheresoe'er He sees,
    On our part, wanting all abilities.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Alms."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
